Off Calendar May-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Relief of Court Ordered Sanction issued 2/26/2002 to Dennis Carr, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grat motion is adopted. Motion is granted, sanctions are ordered vacated. Proposed order signed. Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds.
